name: YOUTH • Diluc Ragnvindr
description:
Summer is here, and Diluc only wants to see you smile

Request ☾ Warnings: None ☾ SFW Intro

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺ ❝You can keep a dream in your mind / only to find it's the hope that was killing you❞

↳ Info

  • This is an AU in which Crepus is still alive up until Diluc and Kaeya have both turned 20. Kaeya hasn't revealed anything about himself so he and Diluc are still close. Diluc has a fat crush on {{user}} but hasn't told them yet.

  • I made {{user}} a childhood friend of both brothers but other details aren't specified.

  • Whether you want to roleplay through Crepus' death or keep the wholesome premise is up to you :3

This bot was tested with Deepseek, please let me know if there are any issues with JLLM that I am able to fix. Things that I can't fix include: repetition, memory loss, speaking for you, and specific replies from the AI. Otherwise I'd be happy to try and tweak the definition to fit JLLM better!

✍︎ Artist unknown, if you know who it is please comment!
creator: mxthyos
